inputs.label: Total Rise (Floor-to-Floor Height)
inputs.businessContext: The total vertical height between finished floor levels.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total vertical height between finished floor levels.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bitmiş döşeme seviyeleri arasındaki toplam dikey yükseklik.

businessContext_i18n.fr: La hauteur verticale totale entre les niveaux finis.

inputs.label: Total Run Available
inputs.businessContext: The total horizontal distance available for the staircase.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total horizontal distance available for the staircase.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Merdiven için mevcut toplam yatay mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Merdiven için mevcut toplam yatay mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La distance horizontale totale disponible pour l'escalier.

inputs.label: Maximum Riser Height (Code)
inputs.businessContext: The maximum allowed riser height as per local building regulations.

businessContext_i18n.en: The maximum allowed riser height as per local building regulations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yerel bina yönetmeliklerine göre izin verilen maksimum rıht yüksekliği.

inputs.label: Minimum Tread Depth (Code)
inputs.businessContext: The minimum required tread depth (going) as per local building regulations.

businessContext_i18n.en: The minimum required tread depth (going) as per local building regulations.

inputs.label: Desired Riser Height
inputs.businessContext: The preferred riser height for comfort, typically between 150-190 mm.

businessContext_i18n.en: The preferred riser height for comfort, typically between 150-190 mm.

inputs.label: Nosing Overhang
inputs.businessContext: The distance the tread extends beyond the riser face. Used for precise tread dimensioning.

businessContext_i18n.en: The distance the tread extends beyond the riser face. Used for precise tread dimensioning.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Basamağın rıht yüzeyinin ötesine uzandığı mesafe. Hassas basamak boyutlandırması için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Abstand, um den die Trittfläche über die Setzstufe hinausragt. Wird für präzise Trittmaße verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance dont la marche dépasse la face de la contremarche. Utilisée pour un dimensionnement précis de la marche.
